text.title: Trello Kanban Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Trello primary tracker AND team size 1-8?

branch.when: trello_primary == true AND team_size >= 1 AND team_size <= 8
branch.question: Single workflow defined AND admin access?
